'''kadhuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zalgo|zalgo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zalgo|zalgo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kadhuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædhithith|kædhithith]] || [[word:kædhithij|kædhithij]] || [[word:kædhithish|kædhithish]] || [[word:kædhithi|kædhithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhudhuthuth|kadhudhuthuth]] || [[word:kadhudhuthuj|kadhudhuthuj]] || [[word:kadhudhuthush|kadhudhuthush]] || [[word:kadhudhuthu|kadhudhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhuthuth|kadhuthuth]] || [[word:kadhuthuj|kadhuthuj]] || [[word:kadhuthush|kadhuthush]] || [[word:kadhuthu|kadhuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhufthuth|kadhufthuth]] || [[word:kadhufthuj|kadhufthuj]] || [[word:kadhufthush|kadhufthush]] || [[word:kadhufthuf|kadhufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhuthuthu|kadhuthuthu]] || [[word:kadhuthuju|kadhuthuju]] || [[word:kadhuthushu|kadhuthushu]] || [[word:kadhuthuku|kadhuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhuthuth|kadhuthuth]] || [[word:kadhuthuj|kadhuthuj]] || [[word:kadhuthush|kadhuthush]] || [[word:kadhuthu|kadhuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhuthuthul|kadhuthuthul]] || [[word:kadhuthujul|kadhuthujul]] || [[word:kadhuthushul|kadhuthushul]] || [[word:kadhuthukul|kadhuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhuthuthuthu|kadhuthuthuthu]] || [[word:kadhuthujuju|kadhuthujuju]] || [[word:kadhuthushushu|kadhuthushushu]] || [[word:kadhuthuku|kadhuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhuthuthun|kadhuthuthun]] || [[word:kadhuthujun|kadhuthujun]] || [[word:kadhuthushun|kadhuthushun]] || [[word:kadhuthukun|kadhuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhuthuthuoro|kadhuthuthuoro]] || [[word:kadhuthujuoro|kadhuthujuoro]] || [[word:kadhuthushuoro|kadhuthushuoro]] || [[word:kadhuthukuoro|kadhuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
